notes: Lesson 23 Part 1 (act 135), 'Kadane — a 1D running scalar', 73.34s, 6 cues. ARR=[-2,1,-3,4,-1,2,1,-5,4] (LC53), best_here=[-2,1,-2,4,3,5,6,1,5], best peaks at 6 (index 6), winning run [4,-1,2,1] indices 3..6. Uses arrays.py (value_row/recolor_cell/value_badge/window_bracket/complexity) + new dp.py (choice_pair). Two iterations: (1) authored + manim -s smoke all 6 cues READ (fixed cue00/cue04 window-bracket label riding into headline -> lowered ARR_Y to 1.35; cue02 prev-badge overlapping compare formula -> vertical restack), (2) full -ql render + READ start/mid/end of every cue from muxed mp4 (fixed cue01 recurrence + cue02 prev-badge now overlapping the index-label row after the array drop -> nudged both down to y0.15/y0.05, re-rendered chunks 1,2 + reconcat). Per-cue checklist (recurrence best_here=max(x, prev+x) mathematically correct, restart-vs-extend pedagogy, negative-prefix reset at i=3 max(4,-2+4=2)=4, global-max tracking to 6, winning window 4+(-1)+2+1=6, O(n)/O(1) bound, safe-area guard, chunk timing all within pin tolerance <=0.066s): ALL PASS.

frames.notes: nums row fading in at t=0.15
run bracket 'a run ending at i' over cells 3..6, cell6 blue (C_STATE); clears headline
best_here badge '?' + note 'largest sum of a contiguous run that ENDS at the current index'
array shown, recurrence about to write
recurrence best_here_i=max(x_i [amber], best_here_{i-1}+x_i [emerald]) legible, clear of index row
cell2 rose (negative prev), cell3 blue (x=4), prev best_here=-2 badge
compare max(4 [emerald], -2+4=2 [rose]) writing; note 'previous run is negative — dragging it only hurts'
max(4, -2+4=2)=4 full; 'restart from 4 -> the negative prefix is abandoned' (emerald). Math correct: restart wins.
best_here=[-2,1,-2,4,3,5,6,1,5], cell6=6 emerald, best badge=6 with arrow to peak
global-max note 'keep the largest best_here ever seen — the optimal run ends somewhere'
window cells 3..6 emerald, label '4 + (-1) + 2 + 1 = 6', best badge 6
winning run held; note 'found the moment best_here first reaches 6'
best_here=6 (blue) + best=6 (emerald), time O(n) space O(1)
